raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Nonprofit Security Grant Program (NSGP) provides security funding to nonprofit organizations at risk of hate-motivated violence.",
    "California has allocated $15 million in security funding in its state budget following the deadly shooting at the Chabad Synagogue in Poway.",
    "Local law enforcement agencies are provided with guidelines to understand when and how to utilize Gun Violence Restraining Orders.",
    "Gun Violence Restraining Orders enable law enforcement to temporarily confiscate firearms from individuals who pose an imminent risk of harm to themselves or others.",
    "The UC Firearm Violence Research Center is required to research best practices for medical and mental health providers to prevent firearm-related injury or death."
  ]
```
